tests.description: Phase 1 tables unchanged after Phase 2 seed
Pro Series 6.0 - M CAD pricing unchanged after Phase 2 seed
Cluster 5.0 and Atomic 5.0 not available in POR
All Phase 2 tables have expected row counts
Component catalog counts match 05/06 source per category
All 11 bundled stub component SKUs exist in product_catalog
No component-type products incorrectly filed as TLS
CPU core/watt/clock and RAM capacity match Intel ARK / CPQ v28
PSU components have no component_specs rows (no applicable columns)
Component MRC values match 05/06 source for Bronze 3106 and LM Standard
Default Xeon Bronze 3106 (zero-price default) has no non-zero pricing rows
Capex amounts and residual percentages match 01_servers.csv
All seeded product_capex rows have use_as_baseline=true
